title: Data centers done right? Xcel and Form Energy team up to power Google operation in Minnesota
description: Xcel Energy will power a new Google data center in Pine Island, Minnesota, in a deal that supports the state's renewable energy goals and ensures Google pays for grid upgrades to keep costs affordable for ratepayers.
content: Xcel Energy will power a new Google data center in Pine Island, Minnesota, in a deal that supports the state's renewable energy goals and ensures Google pays for grid upgrades to keep costs affordable for ratepayers.
